channel.title: A Founder's Story
channel.description: Founder-life photos, videos, route notes, guided-tour updates, and product stories from Philly Tours.

item.title: In-Person Tour Guide Launch
item.description: The new guided route checkout is live on the webapp, making it easier to book a hosted Philadelphia storytelling experience.

item.title: Story Routes Update
item.description: A quick look at how the route pages are evolving, from richer stop previews to stronger planning tools before you arrive on site.
